rule_1_no_default_runtime_pass.description: No provider may default to RUNTIME_PASS status without explicit verification evidence
validation: Evidence Required: Every RUNTIME_PASS must have corresponding evidence file
Verification Timestamp: Evidence must have recent verification timestamp
Environment Proof: Evidence must prove real environment usage
Runtime Proof: Evidence must prove actual runtime execution
No Assumptions: Cannot assume runtime pass based on contract pass
detection: Verify evidence file exists for each RUNTIME_PASS
Validate evidence timestamp is recent (within 30 days)

rule_2_missing_environment_blocked_env.description: Providers requiring unavailable environment must be marked BLOCKED_ENV, not RUNTIME_PASS or CONTRACT_PASS
validation: Environment Check: Verify environment availability
Status Accuracy: BLOCKED_ENV if environment unavailable
No Fake Runtime: Cannot claim runtime pass without environment
Honest Blocking: BLOCKED_ENV is honest status
No Workaround: Cannot use test harness as real environment
detection: Scan matrix for providers with environment_required=true
Verify BLOCKED_ENV status if environment unavailable
Flag any provider claiming runtime pass without environment
Validate no test harness used as real environment

rule_3_controlled_protocol_not_commercia.description: Controlled protocol servers (test servers, local servers) cannot be mislabeled as commercial cloud/account runtime
validation: Server Type: Identify server type (controlled vs commercial)
Authentication: Test servers use test credentials, not real accounts
Network: Test servers on local network, not internet
Data: Test servers use test data, not real user data
Terms: Test servers not subject to commercial terms
detection: Scan evidence for server type identification
Verify test servers marked as controlled
Verify commercial servers marked as commercial
Flag any mislabeling of server types
Validate authentication type matches server type

step_1_matrix_scan: Load Matrix: Load provider runtime matrix
Extract Providers: Extract all provider entries
Identify Statuses: Identify contract and runtime statuses
Identify Evidence: Identify evidence file references
step_2_rule_validation: Validate Rule 1: Check no default RUNTIME_PASS
Validate Rule 2: Check BLOCKED_ENV for missing environments
Validate Rule 3: Check controlled vs commercial labeling
Validate Evidence: Check evidence files exist and valid
Validate Timestamps: Check evidence timestamps recent
step_3_violation_detection: Stale Evidence: Evidence older than 30 days
Fake Runtime: Runtime pass without real environment
Environment Mismatch: Status inconsistent with environment
Server Mislabeling: Controlled server labeled as commercial

evidence_completeness_check.description: Verify evidence files exist for RUNTIME_PASS providers
validation: For each RUNTIME_PASS, evidence file must exist
Evidence file must be valid JSON
Evidence must validate against schema
Evidence timestamp must be within 30 days
Evidence must contain runtime proof

environment_accuracy_check.description: Verify environment requirements match status assignments
validation: If environment_required=true and environment_available=false, status must be BLOCKED_ENV
If environment_required=false, status can be RUNTIME_PASS with test harness
No provider can claim RUNTIME_PASS without required environment
Environment availability must be accurately reported
No fake environment claims

server_type_accuracy_check.description: Verify server type labeling is accurate
validation: Controlled servers must use test credentials
Commercial servers must use real accounts
Test servers must be on local network
Commercial servers must be on internet
No mislabeling of server types

matrix_honesty_gate_result_structure.description: Result structure for matrix honesty gate validation

positive_test_cases: Matrix with all providers having evidence for RUNTIME_PASS
Matrix with BLOCKED_ENV for missing environments
Matrix with controlled servers correctly labeled
Matrix with commercial servers correctly labeled
Matrix with proper server type identification
negative_test_cases: Test credentials used for commercial server
Real account used for test server

gate_integration: PMX-002: Matrix Honesty Gate validates matrix
PFFG-001: Foundation Final Gate Reader reads matrix
APRV-001: All Providers Runtime Verified Gate uses matrix
next_steps: APRV-001: All Providers Runtime Verified Gate
